forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south later this evening. Winds west to northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm later this evening. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
No Rating

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly before dawn then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly and light increasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast later this evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
No Rating

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of morning frost in the north. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, becoming less likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending southerly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog west of Nullarbor. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border, becoming less likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border early this evening. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 22.
